tag_match_threshold.description: Cosine similarity threshold above which a tag is accepted (per tech-plan.md §5.8). Tune from playtest data; do not edit without checking BigQuery distance distributions.

borderline_half_width.description: Half-width of the borderline band around tag_match_threshold within which the tag photo is retained for 30 days (per §5.9). Default 0.10 — widen during early playtest if data is sparse.
